comments.author: reader
comments.text: Excellent observation!  Let's separate the two concerns as much as possible.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: Rename it! We don't want artificial restraints holding back the quality of our codebase. Pay the price of the rename with one small cleanup, or pay the cost of the confusing name forever? Hopefully you understand why I choose the former.

comments.author: reader
comments.text:
Yes, that's somewhat annoying, for sure, but worth the trouble. Clearly diving Clock concerns from Spacial concerns is a fundamental way to understand how the problems are broken down?

But why "Synth"? That's an odd name. If the conceptual breakdown is Time vs. Space, then why don't we make that a bit more clear in the name?
